                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • QSAYSIT_BOOKS_DROPIN_README.md
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • README.md
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • tsconfig.json
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • readme.qisites.md
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • why.qisites.md

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Skipped noisy or risky folders/files by default: .git, .hg, .mypy_cache, .netlify, .next, .nuxt, .obsidian, .pytest_cache, .ruff_cache, .svelte-kit, .svn, .trash, .venv, .vercel, .wrangler, 30_QiDrive, __pycache__, build, dist, env, node_modules, venv. Secret-like files and database/key extensions are also hidden.
